topics.title: Adolescent Psychosis and Depression Risk
topics.description: The cluster centers on psychiatric disorders in youth, especially schizophrenia, depression, bipolar disorder, and psychosis-spectrum conditions. It emphasizes developmental risk factors such as childhood adversity, early life stress, and resilience across adolescence and early psychosis.

topics.title: Brain Dynamics and Connectivity in Consciousness
topics.description: This cluster centers on how brain dynamics and connectivity organize cognition and consciousness, especially across resting state and anesthesia. It emphasizes network-level measures, brain states, and structure-function relationships in human and macaque brains.

topics.title: Alzheimer’s continuum and cognitive decline
topics.description: This cluster centers on Alzheimer’s disease and related stages across the cognitive decline spectrum, including preclinical, prodromal, and mild cognitive impairment. It also emphasizes biomarkers and neurodegenerative changes linked to dementia risk and progression.

topics.title: Deep Learning Pipelines for Brain MRI Segmentation
topics.description: This cluster centers on automated brain MRI analysis methods, especially deep learning and atlas-based segmentation pipelines. It emphasizes validation, reproducibility, and comparisons across tools such as FreeSurfer, SynthSeg, and related open-source workflows.

topics.title: Neural Bases of Emotion and Social Behavior
topics.description: This cluster centers on the neural correlates of emotion processing, regulation, and affective behavior, with recurring emphasis on regions such as the amygdala and processes like fear, empathy, and reward. It also links these affective mechanisms to anxiety, curiosity, and decision making.

topics.title: Neural Bases of Visual Imagery and Decoding
topics.description: This cluster centers on fMRI-based investigation of visual imagery, attention, and recall in the human visual cortex and primary motor cortex. It also highlights neural correlates, representations, and decoding approaches used to study how information is encoded in brain activity.

topics.title: Brain aging across the adult lifespan
topics.description: This cluster focuses on how aging relates to brain structure, brain age, and cognitive changes across adulthood. It includes studies of healthy aging, lifespan effects, and structural markers linked to cognition and memory.

topics.title: Neuromodulation for Psychiatric and Movement Disorders
topics.description: This cluster centers on neuromodulation treatments such as deep brain stimulation, TMS, and electroconvulsive therapy across depression, OCD, and movement disorders. It also includes studies of treatment response, targets, and clinical efficacy in diverse patient populations.

topics.title: High-Resolution fMRI Methods and Signal Optimization
topics.description: The cluster centers on optimizing fMRI acquisition and analysis for high-resolution imaging, with emphasis on signal quality, motion control, and reliability. It includes both animal and human approaches, especially multi-echo and mesoscale fMRI at high field strengths.

topics.title: Neurodevelopment Across Childhood and Adolescence
topics.description: Studies focus on brain development from neonatal and preterm periods through childhood and adolescence, with attention to normative trajectories and cognitive outcomes. Common themes include white matter and cortical thickness changes across development.

topics.title: Lesion-Related Recovery and Network Reorganization
topics.description: This cluster centers on neurological injuries and tumors, especially stroke and traumatic brain injury, and how lesions relate to functional recovery, motor outcome, and cognitive deficits. It also highlights structural and network alterations, including microstructural change and structural disconnection, across different brain disorders.

topics.title: Aperiodic and Alpha EEG Dynamics in Consciousness
topics.description: This cluster centers on EEG and MEG studies of neural oscillations and aperiodic activity, with emphasis on alpha-band features, signal complexity, and dynamic brain-state changes. The abstracts also connect these measures to consciousness, anesthesia depth, and other physiological or cognitive states.

topics.title: Language Lateralization and Network Organization
topics.description: This cluster centers on how language and speech are organized in the brain, especially language network specialization, lateralization, and related clinical or developmental differences such as aphasia and dyslexia. It also includes studies of multilingual speakers and fMRI-based investigations of neural architecture and dynamics.

keywords: constrained dynamic functional connectivity predicts surgical outcome
constrained dynamic functional connectivity predicts surgical outcome of temporal lobe epilepsy
topics.title: Epilepsy localization and connectivity dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on identifying epileptogenic and seizure onset zones in epilepsy, especially drug-resistant and temporal lobe epilepsy, using intracranial and scalp EEG. It also emphasizes dynamic and effective connectivity features for understanding seizure activity and predicting surgical outcome.

keywords: adni resting state functional mri processing quality control
topics.title: Open Neuroimaging Workflows and Infrastructure
topics.description: This cluster centers on open, standardized neuroimaging infrastructure for data conversion, processing, quality control, and workflow automation. It also spans tools and frameworks that support reproducible analysis, dataset management, and clinically actionable neuroimaging research.

topics.title: Neurodevelopmental Variability in Autism and ADHD
topics.description: This cluster centers on developmental differences in autism and ADHD, especially across childhood and adolescence. It highlights atypical attention, brain functional characteristics, and clinically distinct subgroups.

topics.title: Neural Mechanisms of Pain Perception
topics.description: This cluster centers on brain mechanisms and markers of pain across chronic and experimental contexts, including altered morphology, connectivity, and perfusion. It also includes related conditions such as chronic pain, trigeminal neuralgia, juvenile fibromyalgia, and tinnitus-linked pain processing.

keywords: localised high amplitude slow local sleep wave
topics.title: Sleep State Dynamics and Glymphatic Function
topics.description: This cluster centers on human sleep architecture and its dynamic brain-state changes across NREM and REM sleep. It also highlights sleep-related physiological mechanisms, including glymphatic and cerebrospinal fluid coupling, locus coeruleus involvement, and links to insomnia and memory impairment.

keywords: lsd reshapes cortical dynamics through peak frequency shifts
topics.title: Psychedelic Effects on Brain Network Dynamics
topics.description: This cluster centers on how psychedelics and related compounds such as psilocybin, ketamine, and LSD alter functional brain connectivity, cortical dynamics, and network organization. The abstracts emphasize dynamic modeling and EEG/fMRI-based measures of brain state reconfiguration and entropy.

topics.title: Test Cluster
topics.description: The cluster is centered on the phrase test. It likely reflects a minimal or placeholder grouping rather than a substantive neuroscience topic.
